metadata.title: Account & security | Slashie
metadata.description: Manage Slashie account contact details, sign-in methods, security, language, and preferences.

en.title: Account & security
en.descriptionBefore: Login, security, and contact settings. Your photo, name, bio, and date of birth live on
en.loginMethodsDescription: How you sign in to Slashie.
en.securityDescription: Reset your password with an email to the address on file.
en.passwordValue: Use the reset flow to change.
en.sessionDescription: Logging out clears the session token and the cached me snapshot.
en.settingsDescription: Control discovery, language, and product email preferences.
en.languageDescription: Switch between English and Traditional Chinese. Signed-in changes are saved to your account.
en.privateProfileDescription: Hide your profile from public discovery and search.
en.marketingEmailsDescription: Receive occasional product news and tips by email.

metadata.title: 帳戶與安全 | Slashie
metadata.description: 管理 Slashie 帳戶聯絡資料、登入方式、安全、語言和偏好。

zh_hk.title: 帳戶與安全
zh_hk.descriptionBefore: 登入、安全和聯絡設定。你的相片、姓名、簡介和出生日期位於
zh_hk.securityDescription: 使用存檔電郵重設密碼。
zh_hk.sessionDescription: 登出會清除 session token 和已快取的 me 資料。
zh_hk.settingsDescription: 控制公開搜尋、語言和產品電郵偏好。
zh_hk.languageDescription: 切換英文和繁體中文。已登入的變更會儲存至你的帳戶。
zh_hk.privateProfileDescription: 在公開搜尋和探索中隱藏你的個人檔案。
zh_hk.marketingEmailsDescription: 偶爾透過電郵接收產品消息和小貼士。
